title: The Last Command Sourcebook

'''''The Last Command Sourcebook''''' is a hardcover supplement to [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] published by [[West End Games]]. It was written by [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]] and first published in [[March]] [[1994]]. The material covered includes characters, locations, [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and much more that appeared in the final volume of Timothy Zahn's series.'''

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Finally! The stunning conclusion to Timothy Zahn's three-book cycle is adapted for ''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game''.''

''The New Republic faces a grave challenge from a reunited Empire, as the infamous Imperial Grand Admiral Thrawn takes the battle to Coruscant, the very heart of the New Republic! As Thrawn plans his final stunning campaign, the New Republic's bravest heroes race across Wayland in a desperate attempt to destroy the Emperor's cloning chambers at Mount Tantiss! Learn the story-behind-the-story of this climactic showdown between the Republic and the evil Galactic Empire.''

''Return to the wonder and excitement of a far-off galaxy in this companion volume to Timothy Zahn's best-selling novel ''The Last Command''. This book includes complete information and game statistics on all of the characters, aliens, vehicles, droids, planets and starships from this gripping adventure.''

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=
|text=Grand Admiral Thrawn and his renewed
Empire have pushed the New Republic to the
brink of collapse. Using legions of cloned sol-
diers and the recovered ''Katana'' fleet, the Empire
has invaded and occupied countless Republic
worlds. The Republic, shaken by this new offensive,
must hold off the Empire's advances.

Jedi Luke Skywalker has ventured into the heart of
Imperial space in an effort to find the source of the
Empire's clones, while Princess Leia Organa Solo, Han Solo
and Mon Mothma struggle to hold the New Republic govern-
ment together.

The final battle has just begun ...
}}
